rawAssistant: A trip to the marsh, eh? I've got just the thing for you. A sturdy Antidote charm vial and a few strands of my specially woven twine could do wonders for keeping that Poison at bay. I also have some salvage kits that might come in handy – don't want you losing any gear to the mire. And, as an added precaution, how about a stitched coat with some built-in wind resistance? It's not much, but it'll help keep your party warm and dry on those misty marsh roads.
